events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the staged pull was flagged **fail** — pulling a long feeder/branch run without wire-pulling lubricant drives up friction and pulling tension, risking insulation abrasion that can damage the conductor's required color identification (NEC 200.6/210.5) and cause latent insulation failures. Corrective action is to halt, apply a compatible UL-listed lubricant, verify pulling-tension calculations, and inspect/megger-test the conductors before proceeding.
